title: TOTIO Grey Oak Texture Self Adhesive Wallpaper Peel Stick Matt Thicken 16x118inch Wood Grain Vinyl Wrap Light Gray Sticky Back Plastic Roll Waterproof Furniture Sticker PVC Wall Stickers Removable
features: Grey oak wallpaper with backed adhesive technology for strong adhesion, no extra glue required, just peel and stick and enjoy your DIY happy hour.
Grey woodgrain furniture sticker is waterproof, oil and stain resistant, very easy to clean and stains can be wiped off directly with a damp cloth.
Grey self-adhesive wallpaper is made from thickened vinyl and is hard-wearing, with a simulated wood finish that feels very authentic.
Grey woodgrain vinyl wrap can be replaced at will and leaves no adhesive residue when peeling off the wallpaper.

Woodgrain effect wallpaper are economical and ideal for upgrading rental flats and can be refurbished to decorate counters, cabinets, shelf liners, drawers, doors, worktops, backsplashes, kitchen islands, bookcases, wardrobes, countertops, tables, desks, shelves, display cabinets, pianos, furniture, floors, kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, offices, student dormitories, clothing shops and more.
description: Product Description Transform Your Space Instantly with Realistic Wood Texture – No Glue, No Hassle! Revolutionize Your Space in Minutes - Premium Self-Adhesive Wood Wallpaper That Looks & Feels Like Real Wood! Tired of dull white walls? Instantly create a warm, natural wood accent wall that transforms the entire feel of your room. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, and offices! An Easy Way to Get the Luxurious Wood Look Without the Cost or Mess of Real Wood! For Walls: Instant Character Upgrade Tired of dull white walls? Instantly create a warm, natural wood accent wall that transforms the entire feel of your room. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, and offices! For Furniture: Budget-Friendly Makeovers Give old furniture new life! Easily cover scratched tables, dated cabinets, or boring shelves with our premium wood finish. Save hundreds on replacement costs! Kitchen Backsplash Upgrade Waterproof & grease-resistant! Protect walls behind stoves with easy-to-clean teak wood print (no grout lines to scrub!). Why choose us? No pros needed—just peel, stick & enjoy! Our advanced adhesive grips instantly but removes cleanly. Laser-printed 3D wood grains with tactile texture—so authentic, even contractors ask if it’s real. Easy to cut and shape around outlets, corners, and curves for a perfect, professional-looking fit every time. Thousands of renters confirm: our wallpaper removes cleanly after years when following our simple removal steps. TOTIO Large Size Woodgrain Wallpaper Brown Oak Grain Vinyl Wrap 24x197inch Ma...
